message:
feat(core): add native mux e2e validation harness (ft-3681t.2.7)

20 cross-module integration tests validating the native mux subsystem as
a cohesive whole: lifecycle correctness invariants, topology determinism,
command transport routing, profile resolution, durable state persistence,
headless server federation, and full fleet provision/rollback scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
